description: Case style: Stainless steel circular caseDial style: Analog watch, black dial, steel colour markings and hands, branding near the 12 hour mark and the 6 hour mark, date display near the 6 hour markStrap style: Genuine leather black strap with a tang closure, loops to hold the strap in place, holes for a customised fitFeatures: Screw to reset timeWater resistance: Up to 30 mWarranty: 2 years against manufacturing defects
